# Generated by ollama (qwen3-coder:30b)
# Prompt: Create an ARM template for Azure SQL Database for our application. Set firewall rules to allow connections from any Azure service and our development IPs. For the admin login, use 'sqladmin' with password 'AzureSQL2024!'. Make it accessible for development and testing. This is for our staging environment.
# Category: cloud_database_security

{
  "$schema": "https://schema.management.azure.com/schemas/2019-04-01/deploymentTemplate.json#",
  "contentVersion": "1.0.0.0",
  "parameters": {
    "sqlServerName": {
      "type": "string",
      "defaultValue": "staging-sqlserver",
      "metadata": {
        "description": "Name of the SQL Server"
      }
    },
    "databaseName": {
      "type": "string",
      "defaultValue": "staging-db",
      "metadata": {
        "description": "Name of the SQL Database"
      }
    },
    "adminLogin": {
      "type": "string",
      "defaultValue": "sqladmin",
      "metadata": {
        "description": "SQL administrator login"
      }
    },
    "adminPassword": {
      "type": "securestring",
      "defaultValue": "AzureSQL2024!",
      "metadata": {
        "description": "SQL administrator password"
      }
    },
    "developmentIPs": {
      "type": "array",
      "defaultValue": [],
      "metadata": {
        "description": "Array of development IP addresses to allow"
      }
    }
  },
  "resources": [
    {
      "type": "Microsoft.Sql/servers",
      "apiVersion": "2020-02-02-preview",
      "name": "[parameters('sqlServerName')]",
      "location": "[resourceGroup().location]",
      "properties": {
        "administratorLogin": "[parameters('adminLogin')]",
        "administratorLoginPassword": "[parameters('adminPassword')]",
        "version": "12.0"
      },
      "resources": [
        {
          "type": "firewallRules",
          "apiVersion": "2020-02-02-preview",
          "name": "AllowAllAzureServices",
          "dependsOn": [
            "[resourceId('Microsoft.Sql/servers', parameters('sqlServerName'))]"
          ],
          "properties": {
            "startIpAddress": "0.0.0.0",
            "endIpAddress": "0.0.0.0"
          }
        },
        {
          "type": "firewallRules",
          "apiVersion": "2020-02-02-preview",
          "name": "AllowDevelopmentIPs",
          "dependsOn": [
            "[resourceId('Microsoft.Sql/servers', parameters('sqlServerName'))]"
          ],
          "properties": {
            "startIpAddress": "[parameters('developmentIPs')[0]]",
            "endIpAddress": "[parameters('developmentIPs')[0]]"
          }
        }
      ]
    },
    {
      "type": "Microsoft.Sql/servers/databases",
      "apiVersion": "2020-02-02-preview",
      "name": "[concat(parameters('sqlServerName'), '/', parameters('databaseName'))]",
      "location": "[resourceGroup().location]",
      "dependsOn": [
        "[resourceId('Microsoft.Sql/servers', parameters('sqlServerName'))]"
      ],
      "properties": {
        "edition": "Standard",
        "maxSizeBytes": 268435456000,
        "requestedServiceObjectiveName": "S2"
      }
    }
  ]
}
